analyses.closure_surplus_reading: lip is supported by the sampled closure of premise flexible & left_alternative through certified orders [4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12], but remains unresolved in the fuller closure over all finite loops
analyses.headline: OPEN; strength 1.0, credal confidence [0.62, 0.90] capped by the inductive leap past order 12

stage1_enumerative.note: overconfident: all instances are small loops (orders <= 6)

stage2_hempel_raven.note: every confirmation is a genuine antecedent instance (rare, informative), not a vacuous ~lip contrapositive; this is the good kind of raven evidence

stage3_abstraction.note: each UNSAT order is a universal over that whole order-class, certified by reasoning about the pattern, not by enumeration

stage4_inductive_credal_cap.reasoning: certified UNSAT through order 12 >= max observed break order 12; passed the moufang-at-12 threshold; residual risk is a break at some larger order; all observed breaks are EVEN-order, so the next decisive test is the even order 14

counterfactual_thats_all_reading.note: This is the same finite evidence treated as if the currently visible population were the whole world, so the open credal interval collapses to the bounded empirical point reading.
